What We Make

Our Products

Manufactured with precision for diagnostic laboratories and pathology centers across the region.

Single Use | Sterile

Endocervical Brush, Spatula & Swab Stick Kit

A complete sterile collection kit for cervical sampling. Includes endocervical brush, Ayre's spatula, and cotton swab. EO sterilized, individually packed.

Lab Storage

Microscope Slide Mailer Box

Durable plastic mailer box for safe transport and storage of microscope slides. Internal dividers, secure hinged latch, built for everyday lab use.

Histopathology

Histology Embedding Mold

Square plastic mold with ribbed walls and open-top design for tissue embedding in histopathology processing. Consistent dimensions, batch reliable.

Slide Storage

Compact Slide Storage Case

Hinged flip-top case for organizing and protecting microscope slides. Secure closure, lightweight design — ideal for both lab and fieldwork use.

Our Promise

Why Choose Us?

We don't just manufacture — we deliver trust, quality, and reliability to every lab.

Abloom products are EO (Ethylene Oxide) sterilized and manufactured under strict quality standards, ensuring every instrument is safe, sterile, and ready for diagnostic use. Each batch is certified and individually sealed.

Yes. All our disposables are designed for single use only, eliminating any risk of cross-contamination. Our peel-open sterile packaging maintains hygiene from the factory floor to the lab bench.

Absolutely. We cater to diagnostic centers, hospitals, and independent pathology labs of all sizes across Kolkata and beyond. Our flexible ordering makes it easy for any lab to access quality consumables.

Consistency is our priority. Each production batch undergoes quality checks to ensure dimensional accuracy, sterility, and packaging integrity — so you get the same dependable product every time.

We specialize in endocervical brush kits with spatula and swab sticks, microscope slide mailer boxes, histology embedding molds/cassettes, and compact slide storage cases — all disposable and lab-grade.

Simply reach out via email at abloom.kolkata@gmail.com or call us at +91 89103 29634. We'll respond promptly with product details, pricing, and delivery timelines tailored to your lab's requirements.
